title: ratibida latipalearis
intro: Ratibida latipalearis, also known as the yellow coneflower, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ratibida latipalearis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and its roots can be used in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
